description_long: This object is a stylized mask resembling a human male face with exaggerated features. The mask is primarily white with a prominent, sculpted mustache and a pointed goatee, both rendered in a slightly lighter shade. The eye holes are large and almond-shaped, allowing for clear visibility. The facial features are smooth and rounded, with defined cheekbones and a subtle brow ridge. The mask appears to be made of a lightweight material, likely plastic or resin, and is hollow on the inside. There are no visible straps or fastenings, suggesting it is intended as a decorative or costume piece.
description: A white, stylized male face mask with a prominent mustache and goatee, featuring smooth, rounded facial features and large eye holes.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full face, mustache, goatee, and both eye holes clearly.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the protruding nose, mustache, and the depth of the facial features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the hollow interior and the absence of facial details, with only the mask's outline visible.
description_view_3: Left-side view emphasizing the profile of the nose, mustache, and goatee, with the face's curvature visible.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the object is a mask with facial hair details.
attribute_pose: No body or limbs present; only a static face mask is depicted.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with a slight upward curve of the mustache, open eyes, and relaxed brows.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; only a sculpted mustache and goatee are present.
